Tiqets’ mission is to bring more people to culture. It brings travelers and venues together to create fantastic
experiences. With an amazing offering of attraction and museum tickets, from the Van Gogh Museum in
Amsterdam to the Burj Khalifa in Dubai, that stretches across the globe (and still growing) there is something
to do for every traveler.
The innovative technology of Tiqets ensures that travelers can book tickets on their phone at the last minute,
receive their tickets directly in digital form, and show their mobile phones to museums, places of interest and
attractions.

How do we do this?
Via our direct partnerships with all the museums and attractions in the world.
Offering mobile tickets. Who wants to spend time printing tickets while on vacation.
By making it possible to buy tickets for the same day, even on location while standing in line.
Where applicable, we have skip-the-line tickets, so that our customers don’t have to wait for hours but instead
can enjoy their time walking through the Louvre, taking pictures from the Empire State Building or
experiencing a thrill ride at Universal Studios Singapore.


USPs:
· Finally, a revenue-generating model for tickets to the biggest attractions and museums that don’t have
an affiliate program themselves
· Hundreds of attractions on offer
· A complete overview of a city: museums, attractions, zoos, canal cruises, concerts; basically anything
you would need an entrance ticket for
· A unique proposition with instant tickets and “mobile” entry
· A huge amount of possibilities on the site, with landing pages for cities, attractions, themes, and of
course deeplinks to products
· Our site is available in 7 languages, just like our customer service. We continuously improve our
website, which results in a high-converting booking flow. The site is responsive and works great on all mobile
phones and tablets.

About the Brand

Krungthai Card Public Company Limited (“Company” or “KTC”) operations includes credit card business, credit card related business, personal loan business, utilities payment services, and also act as a payment service provider under supervision. KTC was registered as a juristic person on 4th December 1996, with an authorized capital of Baht 50 million, and was transformed into a public company limited under the name of Krungthai Card Public Company Limited on 2nd July 2002. Later on, there was a resolution on an extraordinary general meeting to increase the company’s authorized capital by another Baht 950 million by means of right offerings to Krung Thai Bank Public Company Limited as a former shareholder for 44 million shares and to public offerings for 51 million shares; therefore, the total authorized capital was raised to Baht 1,000 million with total shares of 100 million shares. The company was listed in the Stock Exchange of Thailand on 28th October 2002.

Brand Offer Description

GeForce NOW powered by Bro.game is NVIDIA's cloud gaming service that allows you to play PC games you own on various devices, even if those devices don't typically have the necessary hardware. Instead of running the game locally on your device, the game is rendered on powerful NVIDIA servers in the cloud and streamed to you over the internet. Your inputs (keyboard, mouse, or controller) are sent back to the servers in real-time, making it feel like you're playing the game directly on your device.

 

What is GeForce NOW

GeForce NOW powered by Bro.game delivers next-generation gaming performance without the need for expensive hardware. By leveraging the power of NVIDIA's RTX servers in the cloud, your audience can experience stunning visuals, smooth frame rates, and even ray tracing on their existing devices.

Empowers gamers to play their favorite PC titles on virtually any device they own, from their phone on the go to their smart TV in the living room. It's about breaking down barriers and making high-quality gaming accessible to everyone. 

Benefits of GeForce NOW:

Play on Any Device: You can play demanding PC games on devices that wouldn't normally be capable, such as low-spec laptops, Macs, Chromebooks, smartphones, tablets, and smart TVs.
High-Quality Graphics: Premium membership tiers offer access to high-performance GeForce RTX GPUs on the servers, enabling you to stream games with high resolutions (up to 4K), fast frame rates (up to 120fps, and even higher in some cases), and advanced graphical features like ray tracing and NVIDIA DLSS.
No Need for Expensive Hardware: You don't need to invest in a powerful gaming PC or console to play the latest games with great visual fidelity.
Instant Access: Start playing your games almost instantly without waiting for downloads or installations.
Game Compatibility: It works with a vast library of games that you can connect from your existing digital storefront accounts, plus a selection of free-to-play games are also available.
Portability: You can seamlessly switch between different supported devices and continue playing your games.
Always Updated: The games on the servers are always updated, so you don't have to worry about managing patches.
Save Storage Space: Games are not installed locally, saving valuable storage space on your devices.


This extensive library includes a wide variety of titles from different genres and publishers. It's important to note that GeForce NOW primarily operates on a "bring your own games" model. This means that to play a supported game on GeForce NOW, you generally need to:

  • Own the game on a supported digital storefront such as Steam, Epic Games Store, Ubisoft Connect, or EA.
  • Connect your account from these stores to your GeForce NOW account.
  • Launch the game through the GeForce NOW app.
  • GeForce NOW also supports some free-to-play games that you can play without owning them separately.

The game library is continually updated, with new games being added regularly. NVIDIA announces these additions through their "GFN Thursday" updates. For example, in April 2025 alone, over 20 new games were added to the service.

Therefore, you can definitely play a vast selection of games, exceeding 2,000 titles, through the GeForce NOW cloud gaming service.

 

Who we’re looking for?

Regarding our marketing strategy, we explore potential collaborations with prominent influencers, streamers, and game casters who have established a significant following within the gaming community. This approach could effectively broaden our reach and engage our target demographic.


Why Join Us?

1. Generous Commission:  Earn up to 3.5% for every new GeForce NOW subscription generated through your unique affiliate link.

2. Potential for Growth: Collaborated with world-class brands like NVIDIA.

3. High-performing affiliates will be considered for exclusive collaborations, souvenir, and content features on our social channels.
